summary: Strong, well-aligned DevOps resume with defensible metrics, but a fabricated future end-date and a present-tense/tense inconsistency on the current role are high-severity must-fixes.

issues.issue: Current full-time role is dated with a fixed future end date, contradicting the source of truth which states the role is 'Jun 2025 – Present'. 'Apr 2026' is a fabricated end date and would also imply the role has ended.
issues.suggestion: Change to "Jun 2025 – Present" per the master brief tenure facts.

issues.issue: The current (ongoing) role uses past-tense verbs throughout ('Built', 'Provisioned', 'Operated', 'Developed', 'Drove'). Master brief marks this role as Present; current roles should use present tense, or at minimum the fabricated end-date fix above must align tense with an ongoing role.
issues.where: DevOps Engineer | eSparkBiz bullets: "Built and maintained 40+ CI/CD pipelines...", "Operated Kubernetes (EKS) clusters..."
issues.suggestion: Once dates show 'Present', use present tense (e.g., 'Build and maintain', 'Operate') or keep a consistent convention; ensure tense matches the ongoing status.

issues.issue: HealthEdge is a healthcare SaaS company; the resume includes a Healthcare Management System project but the summary and skills do not surface any healthcare/compliance-relevant keywords (e.g., HIPAA, compliance, security hardening) that an Associate DevOps role at a health-tech firm may screen for. No JD bullet text was provided, so keyword coverage is judged on company context only.
issues.where: Professional Summary and Technical Skills sections
issues.suggestion: If the actual JD lists keywords (e.g., HIPAA, observability, on-call, specific clouds), mirror them; emphasise the Healthcare project's security/least-privilege framing. Do not fabricate compliance experience not in the brief.

issues.issue: Summary uses 'operational toil 70%' while a bullet uses '~70% of recurring operational toil'; the tilde (~) qualifier is inconsistent between summary and body.
issues.where: Summary: "operational toil 70%" vs bullet: "eliminate ~70% of recurring operational toil"
issues.suggestion: Use '~70%' consistently in both places to match the master brief's '~70%'.

issues.issue: Summary abbreviates release-cycle figure as '45 → 8 min' while the experience bullet writes '45 min → under 8 min'; minor format inconsistency.
issues.where: Summary: "82% (45 → 8 min)" vs bullet: "82% (45 min → under 8 min)"
issues.suggestion: Standardise the notation (e.g., '45 min → 8 min') across summary and bullet.

issues.issue: Contact line (name, email, phone, location, LinkedIn, GitHub) is present in cv.md but not surfaced in this generated JSON payload; confirm the renderer injects the header so it is not dropped.
issues.where: Generated resume JSON has no header/contact block
issues.suggestion: Verify the contact header renders from cv.md/profile.yml in final output.

issues.issue: Project title labels the platform as 'Build & Deploy Infrastructure' which is acceptable, but bullets correctly use 'Operated and extended' — good. No over-claim of originating the platform detected; tier-2 tech (OpenShift, Istio, ELK, Datadog) correctly dropped for this role. Noting as clean confirmation.
issues.suggestion: No change needed; framing aligns with the maintain/extend honesty rule.
